description: Lock metaverse_deep_immersion to persistent immersive virtual worlds built from XR/HCI, networked platforms, AI, and haptics rather than neural-interface or quantum-computing variants.

checks.reason: European Commission and GAO sources describe virtual worlds and immersive technologies around XR, VR, and AR interfaces.
European Commission sources identify advanced AI as part of Web 4.0 and virtual-world building blocks for avatars, reality capture, and content.
European Commission sources frame virtual worlds as part of Web 4.0 and future internet interoperability across platforms and networks.
IEEE and European Commission sources identify haptics as important for richer immersive XR and metaverse interaction.
Virtual-world HCI builds from graphical and human-computer interface concepts even when full immersion uses XR spatial interfaces.
BCI is an optional neural-interface variant, not a source-backed prerequisite for broad metaverse-style virtual worlds.
Virtual-world sources support networked XR, cloud-edge/HPC, AI, HCI, media, and interoperability requirements, not quantum computing as a direct prerequisite.
